title: [Twilight Cavern, Lockers]
description: A pair of sconces decorate the richly stained cedar plank walls, affording a modicum of visual warmth to the otherwise chilly room.  A full-length mirror with a carved frame stands opposite an oversized oxblood leather tuffet, while the far wall is occupied by a long counter.

wayto.27616: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go cedar door'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go cedar door'; end
